Appearances:
Plaintiff Orase McGee Jr. is present.
Attorney Daniel Cheung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leantrice Edwards is present.
Attorney Elisabeth Heck for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Mar-25-2019 remains on calendar. (501)
